cmd: cd /root/Iryna_Karmazina && VP=python3 && [ -x venv/bin/python ] && VP=venv/bin/python; echo "PY=$VP"; $VP -c "import sys;print('exec',sys.executable)"; $VP -c "import anthropic;print('anthropic',anthropic.__version__)" 2>&1; $VP -m pip install -q openpyxl 2>&1 | tail -2; $VP -c "import openpyxl;print('openpyxl',openpyxl.__version__)" 2>&1; echo "--- ExecStart ---"; systemctl show mybot.service -p ExecStart 2>/dev/null
